summary: Benchmark bare go autonomy against Ralph/Oh-My-Codex criteria
description: Create a small benchmark fixture/matrix that measures the stack against autonomous-loop criteria: one-prompt continuation, task splitting, multi-task execution, failure repair, critic loop, safe stop, evidence, and final compact reporting.
acceptance: Benchmark document or test matrix states what is proven, partially proven, and not yet proven versus Ralph/Oh-My-Codex style autonomy.

evidence.summary: Added docs/autonomy-benchmark.md with PASS/PARTIAL/MISS Ralph/Oh-My-Codex matrix and promotion criteria; linked from go-autonomous-loop docs; test asserts proven/partial/missing claims. Verification: pytest -q 12 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.
